params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: An array of design coordinate values for the named instance.
fields.summary: Gets all design coordinates for the specified named instance.

entries.signature: public int GetNamedInstanceDesignCoords (int instanceIndex, Span<float> coords);

params.coords: The span to receive the design coordinate values.
params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The number of design coordinates written into <paramref name="coords" />.
fields.summary: Gets design coordinates for the specified named instance into the provided span.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The number of design coordinates associated with the named instance.
fields.summary: Gets the number of design coordinates for the specified named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the PostScript name of the instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the subfamily name of the instance.
fields.summary: Gets the subfamily name identifier for the specified named instance.

params.colorIndex: The zero-based index of the color entry within the palette.

fields.summary: Gets the name identifier for the specified palette color entry.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.returns: An array of packed RGBA color values (each encoded as R in the low byte, A in the high byte).

entries.signature: public int GetPaletteColors (int paletteIndex, Span<uint> colors);

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.summary: Gets colors from the specified color palette into the provided span.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> associated with the palette.

params.axes: The span to receive the variation axis information.

fields.returns: The number of variation axes written into <paramref name="axes" />.
fields.summary: Gets information about variation axes into the provided span.
Gets a value indicating whether the face contains color glyph layers (COLR table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face contains a COLR color layers table; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains embedded PNG color glyphs (sbix or CBDT table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face contains embedded PNG color glyph data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains color SVG glyphs (SVG table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face contains an SVG color glyph table; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains color palettes (CPAL table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face contains a CPAL color palette table; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains OpenType variable font data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face contains variation axis data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of named instances defined in the variable font.
fields.value: The number of named instances, or zero if the face is not a variable font.

fields.summary: Gets the number of color palettes defined in the CPAL table.
fields.value: The number of color palettes, or zero if the face has no palette data.

entries.signature: public bool TryFindVariationAxis (HarfBuzzSharp.Tag tag, out HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo axisInfo);

params.axisInfo: When this method returns, contains the axis information if found. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.
params.tag: The four-byte tag identifying the variation axis.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if an axis with the specified tag was found; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Attempts to find a variation axis by its four-byte tag.
Gets the number of variation axes defined in the variable font.
fields.value: The number of variation axes, or zero if the face is not a variable font.

fields.summary: Gets information about all variation axes defined in the variable font.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo" /> values describing each axis.
